content: TASK-080 checkpoint done: added SVG export for SVG-backed 2D views. `RenderResult` now exposes `exportSvg()` and `downloadSvg()`, available for overview/layer style SVG views and intentionally rejected for mounted views such as prototype/3d. Updated docs/SYNTAX.md and docs/specs/v0.1/04-engine-api.md. Verification: npm run typecheck, npm test -- render.test.ts, npm run build. Remaining release work: manual browser smoke on localhost/file demo/GitHub Pages, publish 0.1.1 to npm, create/push v0.1.1 tag, verify jsDelivr URLs.
